body_txt: In some stories, a Flash Sideways —or even outright Time Travel —can be caused by The Power of Love . Not just motivated by it: Caused by it. So strong is their love that no boundaries are capable of keeping these lovers apart. Not even the boundaries of space, time, fourdimensional spacetime, or even The Barrier between different universes . Not limited to Time Travel and timelines, the trope also applies to certain cases of targeted reincarnation , long-range telepathy et cetera. Contrast Star-Crossed Lovers . See also Time-Travel Romance and Mindlink Mates .
